summary: Completed testing of bank balance updates on quitação and stock item machine linking features. All 8 backend tests passed. UI tests confirmed machine dropdown in stock item form.
passed_tests: Backend: Get initial bank balance - PASSED
Backend: Quitar conta a RECEBER increases bank balance - PASSED (R$ 2000 → R$ 2500 after R$ 500 recebimento)
Backend: Quitar conta a PAGAR decreases bank balance - PASSED (R$ 2500 → R$ 2200 after R$ 300 pagamento)
Backend: Get machines list - PASSED (6 machines found)
Backend: Create stock item with machine_ids - PASSED (machine_ids and machine_names returned)
Backend: GET /stock/items returns machine_ids and machine_names - PASSED
Backend: Update stock item machine_ids - PASSED
Backend: Stock item can be linked to multiple machines - PASSED
UI: Stock page loads correctly - PASSED
UI: New item dialog has 'Vincular a Máquinas (opcional)' dropdown - PASSED
UI: Machine dropdown shows 6 available machines - PASSED
UI: Selected machine appears as tag below dropdown - PASSED
Backend: PDF export generates valid PDF file - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Quitar conta a RECEBER correctly INCREASES saldo_atual (entrada de dinheiro)
Quitar conta a PAGAR correctly DECREASES saldo_atual (saída de dinheiro)
StockItemResponse model has machine_ids and machine_names fields
GET /stock/items endpoint maps machine_ids to machine_names correctly
Frontend StockPage.jsx has machine dropdown with multi-select capability
PDF export uses cell() function with Paragraph for text wrapping
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested bank balance updates on quitação and stock item machine linking. Bank account ID used: 395f583f-aa02-45c5-af64-c1c1c0b4206d (Conta Principal). Stock items can be linked to multiple machines via machine_ids field. API returns machine_names for display.

quitar_conta_receber_saldo.description: Quitar conta a RECEBER increases bank balance
quitar_conta_receber_saldo.tested_flow: Create conta receber → Quitar with conta_bancaria_id → Verify saldo_atual increased
quitar_conta_receber_saldo.result: PASSED - Balance increased from R$ 2000 to R$ 2500 after R$ 500 recebimento

quitar_conta_pagar_saldo.description: Quitar conta a PAGAR decreases bank balance
quitar_conta_pagar_saldo.tested_flow: Create conta pagar → Quitar with conta_bancaria_id → Verify saldo_atual decreased
quitar_conta_pagar_saldo.result: PASSED - Balance decreased from R$ 2500 to R$ 2200 after R$ 300 pagamento

stock_item_machine_linking.description: Stock items can be linked to machines via dropdown
stock_item_machine_linking.ui_element: Vincular a Máquinas (opcional) dropdown in new item form
stock_item_machine_linking.result: PASSED - Items can be created/updated with machine_ids, API returns machine_names

pdf_export.implementation: cell() function using Paragraph with cell_style for word wrap
